title: Bombardier Movia 346
description: A Retextured M-Train, made to look like the second Bucharest Metro train, Bombardier Movia 346, made with the Resource Pack Creator, built in the Minecraft Transit railway (MTR) mod. Not everything is the same, but i tried to make it look EXACTLY the same.
body: A Retextured M-Train, made to look like the second Bucharest Metro train, Bombardier Movia 346, made with the Resource Pack Creator, built in the Minecraft Transit railway (MTR) mod. Not everything is the same, but i tried to make it look EXACTLY the same. Also if you want a newer one that looks better, download the one that Cake11HD made.
